meta.title: Eez4us — School pickup, in order
meta.description: School-zone pickup coordination platform: real-time ETAs for the gate, QR-verified pickup and a record of every dismissal. For schools in Mexico, the United States and Latin America from $99 MXN or $6.99 USD per student per month.
meta.ogDescription: School-zone pickup coordination: real-time ETAs, QR-verified pickup and a record of every dismissal. Mexico, the United States and Latin America.

hero.title: School pickup time, finally in order
hero.subtitle: Eez4us connects families with gate staff: the school sees every vehicle on its way with its estimated arrival time and releases each student with QR verification. Shorter lines, less waiting, zero mix-ups.
hero.footnote: Schools in Mexico, the United States and Latin America · Free for families

why.item1Body: Students come out when their family is about to arrive, not before. The street stops being a waiting room.
why.item2Body: The gate sees the board ranked by proximity in real time. No one runs around looking for anyone.
why.item3Body: Who picked up each student, at what time and who confirmed it. Backup for the school and for families.

howItWorks.title: From “on my way” to a verified pickup
howItWorks.step1Title: The family says they're on their way
howItWorks.step1Body: One tap in the app and the trip is shared with the school. Location is used only during the trip.
howItWorks.step2Body: Gate staff see vehicles sorted by arrival, with estimated times and a proximity traffic light.
howItWorks.step3Body: Each student is called just in time: no waiting on the sidewalk, no blocking the street.
howItWorks.step4Body: Whoever picks up presents the student's QR card; staff scan it and the pickup is recorded.

product.title: One platform, three workstations
product.subtitle: Families check in from the app, the gate runs its live board, and school leadership manages everything from the web panel.

families.title: For families
families.sub: A simple app, built for the everyday rush.
families.item1: An “on my way” button and an automatic alert when you reach the school zone
families.item2: A fixed QR card per student: grandma or an authorized uncle presents it, nothing to install
families.item3: Trusted circle and one-day temporary authorizations
families.item4: Free for families: the school pays for the service

gate.title: For the gate
gate.sub: Logistics staff stop guessing who's about to arrive.
gate.item1: A real-time list sorted by estimated arrival time
gate.item2: A proximity traffic light to call each student just in time
gate.item3: Built-in QR scanner to confirm every pickup
gate.item4: Works even if a family shows up unannounced: the card gets scanned all the same

admin.title: For school leadership
admin.sub: A web panel with the whole operation under control.
admin.item1: Live map of the school zone and an arrivals board
admin.item2: Student enrollment via Excel and automatic invitations to families
admin.item3: Operational and financial reports by period
admin.item4: Messages and notices to every family from one place

pricing.title: One simple price, per student
pricing.subtitle: The school is billed monthly per active student. Everything included, with no setup or hidden fees. Families never pay Eez4us.
pricing.paymentMx: Monthly subscription with a credit or debit card via Openpay (BBVA).
pricing.paymentUs: Monthly subscription with a credit or debit card via Stripe.
pricing.feature2: Web panel for leadership and a gate board
pricing.latamBanner: Is your school in another Latin American country? We reach there too.
pricing.latamCta: Write to us and we'll set it up
pricing.buyStep1Body: Tell us about your school and we'll set up your account with your institution code.
pricing.buyStep2Title: 2. Set up and upload your student list
pricing.buyStep2Body: Mark your pickup points on the map and upload your students via Excel. Families receive their invitation instantly.
pricing.buyStep3Body: Monthly card payment from the panel: Openpay in Mexico, Stripe in the United States. Cancel anytime.
pricing.footnote: Payments processed by Openpay (BBVA) in Mexico and Stripe in the United States · Monthly billing per active student · Cancel anytime

security.title: Designed around a single question: who is allowed to pick up this student?
security.item1Body: There is no open sign-up: every family account is issued by the school from its student list.
security.item2Title: The QR card isn't in charge
security.item2Body: The code carries no authority of its own: the system checks in the moment who is authorized to pick up today.
security.item3Body: No pickup closes on its own. Gate staff confirm it, scanner in hand.
security.item4Body: The app shares position only during an active trip and stops on arrival. Never permanently in the background.
security.item5Body: Each institution operates in its own space and real-time information travels encrypted.
security.item6Body: Who picked up each student, at what time and who confirmed it: full traceability of every dismissal.

faq.title: What every school asks us
faq.a1: In Mexico, $99 MXN per student per month. In the United States, $6.99 USD per student per month. The school is billed per active student; families never pay Eez4us.
faq.a2: As a monthly subscription with a credit or debit card from the school panel: in Mexico payments are processed by Openpay (BBVA) and in the United States by Stripe. You can cancel anytime.
faq.q3: Does grandma need to install the app?
faq.a3: No. Each student has a fixed QR card that the parent can print or share. Whoever is authorized presents it at the gate and the system validates the authorization instantly.
faq.q4: What if a family shows up unannounced?
faq.a4: The gate scans the card anyway: the system verifies the authorization on the spot and records the pickup, with or without a trip started from the app.
faq.q5: Does the app track parents all day?
faq.a5: No. Location is shared only while there is an active trip to the school and stops on arrival. On iOS the permission is “only while using the app”.
faq.q6: What does the school need to get started?
faq.a6: A list of students and contacts in Excel. Eez4us generates the invitations for families and the school is up and running in days, not months.
faq.a7: In Mexico and the United States, and we're rolling out to the rest of Latin America. If your school is in another country, write to us and we'll coordinate the rollout.

cta.title: Bring Eez4us to your school
cta.body: From $99 MXN or $6.99 USD per student per month, everything included. Write to us and your school is up and running in days.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.body: Tell us about your institution and we'll show you Eez4us in action. No commitment, no runaround: one call, a live demo and a plan for your pickup zone.
contact.phoneNote: Calls and WhatsApp · We reply the same business day
contact.bullet2: Up and running in days: all you need is your student list in Excel
contact.bullet3: $99 MXN or $6.99 USD per student per month, everything included
